ciffc.note: Off-season. National fire statistics will be updated when the 2026 fire season begins.

news.title: Federal officials set to give wildfire season update as blaze threatens B.C. town
news.description: Federal officials are set to provide an update about the national wildfire season today, as an out-of-control fire in British Columbia forced evacuations this week.

news.title: Some structures lost at resort due to Fraser Canyon fires
news.description: A growing B.C. wildfire has forced more evacuations and closed part of the Trans-Canada Highway as officials warn gusty winds could intensify the blaze.

news.title: Heat wave could push humidex to 45 in Manitoba, Saskatchewan
news.description: A prolonged heat wave is set to push temperatures into the mid-30s across southern Saskatchewan and Manitoba as wildfire smoke lingers in northern regions.

news.title: Manitoba town residents set to return home after wildfire forced evacuation
news.description: A social media post by the town of Lynn Lake says that the nearby blaze remains active, and that crews continue to suppress remaining hot spots.

news.title: Wildfire forces evacuation of remote Northwest Territories village
